recent_closes.close_reason: Retro-reconcile 2026-06-02: real Binance bars wicked through entry 81.483 on May-28 16:00 UTC (H 81.66) and through SL 82.807 on May-28 20:00 UTC (H 83.01). Telegram fired today from a worker run that detected the SL retroactively but the JSON commit/push did not land on origin/main. Activation was missed in real-time because update_open_trades skips trades whose coin is not in the current run's analyses dict — SOL was evidently absent during the runs that would have caught the May-28 16:00 wick. Closing manually to match real price action and journal truth.
Manual take-profit (early close after TP1, above TP2)
